description:
Remove cosmic ray artifacts from a raw HST WFPC2 image without blurring the stars, and generate a difference mask showing only the removed artifacts.

1. Open the raw image `~/AstroImages/raw/hst_wfpc2_sample.fits` in AstroImageJ.
2. Apply an outlier rejection filter (e.g., Process -> Noise -> Remove Outliers) to remove the sharp, bright cosmic rays while preserving the structural stars.
3. Save the cleaned image as `~/AstroImages/processed/wfpc2_clean.fits`.
4. Use the Image Calculator (Process -> Image Calculator) to subtract the cleaned image from the original image (Original - Cleaned).
5. Save this difference image (the isolated cosmic rays) as `~/AstroImages/processed/cosmic_ray_mask.fits`.
